treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient tolerated the procedure well and was stable for discharge.

treatment_timeline.event: Surgery performed: transanal excision of rectal polyp.
Patient discharged home after surgical observation.
Pathology results to be reviewed at follow-up appointment.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Results from the polyp sent to pathology to be reviewed at follow-up appointment.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient is tolerating a regular diet and has pain controlled with Tylenol.
